hero.title:
One
person
hero.tagline: The art director you hire before you need a team

about.title: /about
about.p1: Since 2018 I work at the intersection of IT, product and digital — plugging into businesses at active growth, when digital infrastructure is needed but processes and team aren't yet in place.
about.p2: Off-hours: economic strategy games, gardening, game design at Syrnik.dev. Same muscle — systems that compound slowly.
about.desc1: My core role — walk into unstructured processes of growing businesses and turn them into working systems. Fix product and technical logic, set up baseline architecture, put order between business, design, and engineering. 300+ projects since 2018, personally or under my management.
about.desc2: The job isn't to do everything by hand. It's to leave behind a stable platform — a clear product, a baseline technical structure, and the operational order a full IT team can later stand on. One person, before the org chart exists.
